title: Concentric replicator-cell geometry gap (surfaces as PAEFlop ddb 10.7)
goal: PAEFlop's mirror math is VERIFIED faithful in isolation (gradient probe 46.3 dB, synth solo flop-param delta 32.5 dB, Mix-blend fixed e183b34). Its faithful-sweep DIVERGED (worst ddb 10.7 at flop=1 in Replicator-Clones__Concentric) is ENTIRELY replicator-cell geometry contamination: Flop mirrors a replicator layer whose per-cell placement already differs engine-vs-FCP. Fix the Concentric replicator geometry (cell centers/mirror-axis), which will simultaneously lift the Flop-in-Concentric ddb. This is the replicator primitive, not Flop. DoD: fct census + engine-vs-headless on Concentric replicator cells; Concentric 13.55 dB up; PAEFlop sweep flop-param ddb up (no Flop code change needed).
notes: Split out from T-faithful-paeflop 2026-07-18. Flop filter code is correct+faithful.
